intro.title: Engineering & Lab
intro.description: Speed to market doesn't come from rushing - it comes from reducing revision loops. Our engineering support helps you move from concept to manufacturable product with fewer surprises.

items.title: DFM Review (Design for Manufacturing)
items.description: Prevent tooling mistakes and reduce cost risk before we cut steel.

items.title: Rapid Prototyping
items.description: Confirm ergonomics, fit, and user experience with 3D prints or CNC samples.

items.title: Scan Performance Tuning
items.description: Scan engine selection, read-rate optimization, and interface (USB / RS232 / Bluetooth) design.

items.title: Validation Planning
items.description: Define test items that match your target market expectations.

whatYouSend.title: What You Send Us
items: Target market and channel (Amazon, retail, POS integrator)
Desired differentiation (look, scan engine, interface, packaging)

primary.title: Request an Engineering Review
primary.description: Tell us your target market, application, and order quantity. We respond within 24 hours with practical guidance and next steps.

secondary.title: Request a Prototype Plan
secondary.description: Verify read performance, ergonomics, and durability before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
